name: Neiman Marcus Seven Layer Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir shortening just to soften.
2. Sift in dry ingredients (cake flour, baking powder, and salt).
3. Add 1 cup of milk; mix until all flour is dampened.
4. Beat vigorously for 2 minutes.
5. Add remaining milk, eggs, and vanilla. Beat vigorously for 2 more minutes.
6. Pour 2 cups batter into a lightly greased and floured 9x1-1/2-inch round pan. Tilt the pan so the batter runs over the bottom.
7. Invert the pan over a baking sheet and tap the edges on the baking sheet, allowing as much batter to run out of the pan as possible without forcing it.
8. Turn the pan right side up and scrape down the sides to prevent burning and even out any remaining batter on the bottom. Repeat for the other 6 layers, baking as many layers at a time as you have pans and oven space available.
9. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 8 minutes or until done.
10. Cool in the pans for 3-5 minutes, then invert onto a rack to cool completely.
Chocolate Butter Frosting:
1. Blend confectioners' sugar and hot water into melted chocolate (4 squares).
2. With a spoon, beat half of the egg into the chocolate mixture.
3. Beat in the remaining egg.
4. Gradually beat in butter until smooth.
5. Add vanilla extract.
6. If the frosting is too thin, place the bowl in a pan of ice water and continue beating until it reaches a spreading consistency.
